'''Dremulae''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] and was known for the natural beauty of its [[Sea of Translucency]] and for its popular wealthy resort.

Dremulae was a popular [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] tourist attraction, even for those luxury travelers opting for a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] simulation experience—a sim-vacation, or [[Sim-vacation|sim-voyage]].<ref name="Jedi Quest: The False Peace">''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]''</ref>

The [[Dreamul'er]] plant, which could heal a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] cut, was native to Dremulae.

{{Planet-stub}}
